marketing.subhead: Track tenants, generate agreements, and collect rent — built for Malaysian landlords with 1–20 units.
marketing.pillarAutomation: System does the chasing, not you

auth.loginSubtitle: Log in to manage your properties.
auth.registerSubtitle: Create an owner account to manage your rentals.

validation.phoneMy: Enter a valid Malaysian phone number

payments.emptyDescription: Invoices appear once an agreement is active. They're generated monthly based on the rent due day.

viewModal.downloadToast: PDF download arrives with Phase 4 file storage.

agreements.emptyDescription: Create an agreement once you have a tenant assigned to a unit.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete this agreement?
deleteConfirm.body: This will permanently remove the agreement and any attached invoices. This cannot be undone.

tenants.inviteHelp: We'll record this contact. Magic-link invites land when authentication ships.
tenants.emptyDescription: Tenants appear here once you invite them. Each tenant attaches to a unit via an agreement.

deleteConfirm.title: Remove this tenant?
deleteConfirm.body: This will remove {name} and any pending invite. Existing agreements stay on record.

placeholders.name: e.g. Aminah Binti Yusof
placeholders.emergencyName: Person we can call if there's an issue

detail.identityHelp: How we contact this tenant. Status reflects their current relationship with you.
detail.personalHelp: Profile and verification details. Only you see this; the tenant manages their own account.
detail.emergencyHelp: Who to reach if you can't get hold of the tenant — illness, lockouts, late-night issues.

documents.title: Documents
documents.help: IC copy, payslip, agreement signature page, etc.
documents.placeholderHelp: Once file storage is wired up you can upload IC copies, payslips, and reference letters here.

units.sectionHelp: Each property has at least one unit. Tenants and agreements attach to units.
units.emptyHelp: Add your first unit to start tracking tenants and agreements.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete this unit?
deleteConfirm.body: This will remove "{label}" and any attached records. This cannot be undone.

placeholders.label: e.g. Master room, Whole unit, Ground floor shop

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Snapshot of how your portfolio is doing right now.
dashboard.incomeMonthHelp: Successful payments received in the current calendar month.
dashboard.outstandingHelp: {count} unpaid invoices (pending + overdue, including late fees)

incomeChart.title: Income — last 12 months
incomeChart.help: Sum of successful payments per month. Highlighted bar is the current month.

attention.title: Needs attention
attention.help: Things to act on this week.
attention.empty: Nothing needs your attention. Nice work.

emptyState.title: Add your first property
emptyState.description: Properties hold the units you rent out. Start with one and we'll guide you from there.

reports.subtitle: Year-over-year income, outstanding rent, and capital position by property.
reports.totalIncomeHelp: Sum of successful payments received in {year}.
reports.totalOutstandingHelp: Unpaid invoices due in this year (pending + overdue, with late fees).
reports.pdfStub: PDF export arrives in Phase 4 once file storage is wired up.

monthlyBreakdown.title: Monthly income — {year}
monthlyBreakdown.help: Successful payments grouped by calendar month.

perProperty.title: Per-property breakdown
perProperty.help: Income, outstanding rent, occupancy, and net capital position for each property.
perProperty.disclaimer: Net gain uses the resident-individual RPGT estimate. Estimate only, not tax advice.

empty.title: Reports unlock with activity
empty.description: Once you have agreements and payments, this is where annual income, occupancy, and tax reports live.

tickets.subtitle: Issues reported by tenants or logged by you. Drag context with you when you click into a ticket.

empty.title: No tickets yet
empty.description: Log a ticket on a unit's behalf, or wait for tenants to report issues from their app.

create.title: Log a ticket
create.description: Capture an issue against a unit. You can attribute it to yourself or a tenant.

placeholders.title: e.g. Kitchen tap dripping
placeholders.description: What's happening, what's been tried, when it started…

detail.commentPlaceholder: Update for the tenant or note for yourself…
detail.noTransitions: No transitions available from this state.

photos.title: Photos
photos.help: Tenant-uploaded photos arrive in Phase 4 once file storage is wired up.
photos.placeholderHelp: Once file storage is wired, photos attached to the ticket appear here.

profile.identityHelp: How tenants and the system know you.
profile.emailManagedNote: Email is managed by your account login — change it from auth settings.
profile.photoHelp: Profile photos arrive in Phase 4 once file storage is wired up.
profile.photoPlaceholderHelp: Once file storage is wired, your profile photo will live here.
profile.payoutHelp: Where rent collections will be deposited. Bank linkage is managed via your finance settings.

preferences.languageHelp: Affects every label, date format, and translated message in the app.
preferences.themeHelp: Pick a fixed theme or follow your operating system.
preferences.themeLightHelp: Always use the light token set.
preferences.themeDarkHelp: Always use the dark token set.

notifications.channelHelp: We'll send notifications via email and WhatsApp once Phase 4 wires up Resend + WhatsApp Cloud API. In-app notifications are always on.
notifications.eventsHelp: Toggle the events you want to be told about. You can adjust per-channel rules later.

rent_reminder.title: Rent reminders
rent_reminder.help: 7d / 3d / 1d before each invoice is due, plus an alert when an invoice goes overdue.

agreement_expiry.title: Agreement expiry alerts
agreement_expiry.help: 60d / 30d / 7d before any active agreement reaches its end date.

payment_received.title: Payment received
payment_received.help: Confirmation each time a tenant pays an invoice — useful as a manual cross-check.

ticket_update.title: Maintenance ticket updates
ticket_update.help: When tenants log a new ticket, comment on one, or status changes.

invite_accepted.title: Tenant invite accepted
invite_accepted.help: When a tenant accepts your magic-link invite and links to a unit.

plan.title: Subscription
plan.help: Plans cap how many active units you can manage. Upgrade arrives in Phase 7.
plan.upgradeStub: Subscriptions arrive in Phase 7. Demo only for now.
plan.disclaimer: Pricing is illustrative. Final pricing + billing land with the Phase 7 marketing release.

free.name: Free
free.description: For single-property owners testing the waters.

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: For small landlords with a handful of units.

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: For growing portfolios with reporting needs.

addModal.title: Add property
addModal.description: Capture the basics now — you can fill in unit and ownership details after.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete this property?
deleteConfirm.body: This will remove {name} and any attached records. This cannot be undone.

detail.overviewHelp: What's happening with this property right now.
detail.detailsHelp: Identity, location, and physical specs. Edit anytime.
detail.ownershipHelp: Who owns it, what it cost, what it's worth, and what's owed.
detail.utilitiesHelp: Recurring fees and service-account numbers — what it costs to run.

placeholders.notes: Anything else worth remembering about this property

detail.coOwnersHelp: Joint ownership splits. Shares must sum to exactly 100%, and one co-owner must be marked primary.

coOwners.primaryHint: The primary co-owner manages this listing and receives notifications.
coOwners.cantRemovePrimary: Make another co-owner primary before removing this one.
coOwners.blockedSave: Shares must sum to 100% with exactly one primary before saving.

gains.disclaimer: Estimate only — assumes resident-individual filing; non-citizens, foreigners, and companies have different rates. Disposal-side costs (agent commission, sale legal fees) and renovation expenses are not factored in. Not tax advice.

overview.noActive: No active agreements on this property yet.

documents.help: Title deeds, S&P agreement, insurance policy, tax receipts, photos.
documents.placeholderHelp: Once file storage is wired up you can keep title deeds, insurance policies, and tax receipts here.

home.title: Welcome
home.noActiveAgreement: Your agreement is being prepared by your landlord.
